articles.title: Scor's Web3 Cricket Game Sixer Smash Debuts With Star-Studded Roster of T20 Greats
articles.description: One of the fastest-growing Web3 mini-app ecosystems, launched a new swipe-based Web3 cricket game called Sixer Smash.
articles.content:
Key Takeaways
  • SCOR on Sweet has launched Sixer Smash, a Web3 cricket game featuring well-known T20 players.
  • The game uses Web3 avatars of cricketers and allows players to earn Gems, … [+2597 chars]
